| [https://abextm.github.io/cache2/#/viewer/dbrow/5973 5973] || sailing_alpha_runefest_feature_tutorial || 155 || [[0], [Introduction], [Learn the ropes of Sailing!], [Get your sea legs - and your first boat - with the introductory Sailing quest,  <col=FF981F>Pandemonium</col>!<br><br>If you need a refresher later,  check the <col=FF981F>FAQ</col> tab.], [1], [5943], [Where do I start the quest?, This quest can be started by talking to <col=FF981F>Will and Anne</col> near the food shop in Port Sarim., I left the Pandemonium early. How do I get back?, The ship that travels between Port Sarim and Musa Point now also visits the Pandemonium. Just ask <col=FF981F>Captain Tobias</col> in the middle of Port Sarim after your first visit!, Where do I get a boat?, <col=FF981F>Shipwright NPCs</col> can sell you a new boat., How do I get on my boat?, Once you have a boat,  you can board it by interacting with a <col=FF981F>Gangplank</col>. Look for the <col=FF981F>white and red wind sock</col> on the southern dock at Port Sarim., How do I get off my boat?, You can disembark by sailing near a <col=FF981F>Gangplank</col> and interacting with it from your boat., How do I sail my boat?, Interact with the <col=FF981F>Helm</col> at the back of your boat to start navigating. Use your <col=FF981F>Sails</col> to control your speed,  and use the sea to turn., What does it mean when I feel a gust of wind?, Occasionally you'll feel a <col=FF981F>gust of wind</col>. This means the wind is blowing strongly. If you <col=FF981F>trim your sails while the wind is gusting</col>,  your boat will get a temporary <col=FF981F>speed boost</col>!, I lost my boat! How do I get it back?, <col=FF981F>Shipwright NPCs</col> are able to retrieve and repair capsized boats - for a fee! You can find one near the southern dock in Port Sarim., My boat is at a different port! How do I get it back?, <col=FF981F>Shipwright NPCs</col> will retrieve boats from other ports for you,  for a small amount of coins. You can find one near the southern dock in Port Sarim., My boat got stuck! How do I fix it?, You can access the <col=FF981F>reverse</col> option by stopping the boat and then clicking the down arrow on the sailing side panel,  this should resolve most cases. If you are still stuck you can <~text_device(^standard_rightclick, ^mobile_rightclick)> the <col=FF981F>Helm</col> and select the <col=FF981F>escape</col> option.], [3721], [5761], [Completing this activity will finish the Pandemonium quest and raise your Sailing level to 10. Do you want to continue?]]

| [https://abextm.github.io/cache2/#/viewer/dbrow/5981 5981] || sailing_alpha_runefest_feature_crew || 155 || [[8], [Crewmates], [Help on your boat!], [As you become a better sailor,  you learn to delegate. A good captain knows how to command their crew effectively.<br><br>You can <col=FF981F>recruit crewmates</col> from various places in the world,  though mostly from pubs. Once recruited,  you can find them again on <col=FF981F>The Pandemonium</col>.<br><br>Speak to the <col=FF981F>Crew Registrar</col> at the Pandemonium to <col=FF981F>edit your crewmates</col>. This is your chance to pick which recruited crewmates you want sailing with you.<br>While on the boat,  you can <col=FF981F>command your crew</col> to use specific facilities by using the sidepanel,  or by speaking to them directly.<br><br><col=9F9F9F>In this beta,  the amount of crewmates are limited,  with more expected for full launch.], [7], [5965, 5966, 5967, 5968, 5969], [Where can I find crewmates to recruit?, Crematesw must be recruited before they can be assigned to your boat. They can be found in multiple places across the world. In the beta you can find some of them in the pub in Port Sarim., Why are there no crewmates on my boat?, Once recruited,  speak to the Crew Registrar on the Pandemonium to edit the crewmates assigned to your boats. Note that the raft is too small to fit any crewmates on!, How do I assign a crewmate?, In the facility view within the Sailing sidepanel there are buttons at the end of each row. If a crewmate is already assigned to the facility,  you can see their face on the button. If none is assigned,  press the button to bring up a list of crewmates you can select from to assign them to the facility. Alternatively,  speak to the crewmate directly to assign them.<br>Crewmates are especially useful when doing combat,  as they can steer your boat for you while you fire the cannon. Alternatively you can swap it around - navigate your boat while commanding your crew to cannon anything you point them to., Why won't the crew do what I command?, Crewmates will usually tell you why they can't do what you command. Check out what they are yelling,  or check your chatbox for feedback. Common reasons include the crewmate doesn't have the skill required to use the facility you ordered them to use,  or you sailed into hazardous waters causing them to panic! Or perhaps they simply don't like your tone. Have you tried saying 'please'?<br>Note that only the captain of a boat may assign crewmates.], [7130], [5768], []]
